creator: asiciliano@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for the report and the screenshots.

I had the same problem some month ago (I forgot if on hardware or VM, similar to your configuration), now it seems solved (probably by the commit you pointed).

However, please could you reinstall avoiding "auto UFS"?, I re-had the problem with the fetching some day ago, solved restarting the VM and with "Manual" partitioning.
